mapper.sql: id, enterprise_name, credit_code, contact_person, contact_email, contact_phone, remark, expire_date, is_locked, is_active, last_login_time, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ent_enterprise WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM ent_enterprise WHERE deleted = 0
AND enterprise_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%')
AND is_active = #{isActive}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ent_enterprise ( enterprise_name, credit_code, contact_person, contact_email, contact_phone, remark, expire_date, is_locked, is_active, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseName}, #{creditCode}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{expireDate}, #{isLocked}, #{isActive}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ent_enterprise
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, enterprise_name = #{enterpriseName}, credit_code = #{creditCode}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, remark = #{remark}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, is_locked = #{isLocked}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
